{{Quote|I understand now. Some things are better left at the bottom of the sea.|The dying [[Quermian/Legends|Quermian]] professor [[Murk Lundi]] confesses to 13-year-old Padawan Anakin Skywalker his grave error in disturbing the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|forbidden evil]] that was the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Holocron of King Adas|Holocron]] of [[Adas|King Adas]], buried long ago beneath the seas of Kodai|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers">''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]''</ref>}}
'''Kodai''' was a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belderone sector/Legends|Belderone sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Some time prior to [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], its entire surface had been flooded save for the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Rena (city)|Rena]].
[[File:The_Followers_JA20_SE.jpg|thumb|left|Kenobi and Skywalker on their mission to Kodai, soon after which Anakin constructed [[Anakin Skywalker's first lightsaber/Legends|his first lightsaber]]]]The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] took advantage of Kodai's oceans to dispose of the [[Holocron of King Adas|holocron]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Adas]]. The [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] was buried under millions of tons of water, deep in an underwater geyser crater, in the hopes that no one else would fall under Adas's influence and the powerful pull of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force real-life book">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], the Jedi, with the aid of the [[Quermian/Legends|Quermian]] expert on the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], [[Murk Lundi]], recovered the holocron from beneath Kodai's oceans. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] took the holocron to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], delivering it to chief archivist [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]], in order to secure the dangerous artifact within the Temple's archival vaults.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers" />

{{Planet-stub}}
